series_metadata.series_description: Series contains originals of 1199 and SCOPE/OEA (State Council of Professional Educators/Ohio Educators Association) employee applications for tuition reimbursement. Copies of course material needed, copies of proof of payment and book receipts, copies of attendance and/or grades, copies of all correspondence between agency and employee, also copy of payment voucher.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Keep in office five years current year ; Electronic: Keep in office five years current year
